tasks.title: Add markUserReady helper skeleton
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/src/test-users/markUserReady.ts with: the TOUR_READY_SENTINEL constant (9999) with JSDoc pointing at apps/admin/src/config/ia/tours.ts and explaining it is a fixture-only value; the UserReadyModelPort type (findOne + update only) so the helper is unit-testable without a live DB; the MarkUserReadyParams / MarkUserReadyResult types; and the async markUserReady signature with full JSDoc. No merge logic yet (lands in T-002). Acceptance: pnpm --filter @repo/seed typecheck passes; the module exports markUserReady, TOUR_READY_SENTINEL, UserReadyModelPort.

subtasks.title: Define TOUR_READY_SENTINEL with JSDoc + UserReadyModelPort + param/result types
Declare markUserReady signature with JSDoc, no body logic

qualityGate.notes: Green in worktree: @repo/seed typecheck/lint clean (2 pre-existing @repo/ai-core baseline errors unrelated), 17 markUserReady tests pass. Adversarial review applied (warn-on-not_found in seed loop, sentinel parse assertion, mustChangePassword test-scope comment).

tasks.title: Implement read-modify-write merge in markUserReady
tasks.description: Implement the body: findOne({email}); if missing return {ok:false, reason:'not_found'}. Otherwise spread existing settings -> onboarding -> adminTours / whatsNew (calqued from UserService.markAdminTourSeen in packages/service-core/src/services/user/user.service.ts:1304-1358). Set adminTours['host.welcome']=TOUR_READY_SENTINEL; set whatsNew.baselineAt = existing ?? new Date().toISOString() (idempotent). Call model.update({id}, {profileCompleted:true, mustChangePassword:false, settings: mergedSettings}). Return {ok:true, userId}. MUST NOT touch admin_info.passwordChangeRequired. MUST preserve all pre-existing settings keys. Acceptance: typecheck clean; logic matches AC-1.x / AC-3.x in spec.

subtasks.title: Write profileCompleted + mustChangePassword=false + mergedSettings via update

qualityGate.notes: Green in worktree: @repo/seed typecheck/lint clean (2 pre-existing @repo/ai-core baseline errors unrelated), 17 markUserReady tests pass. Adversarial review applied (warn-on-not_found in seed loop, sentinel parse assertion, mustChangePassword test-scope comment).

tasks.title: Unit tests for markUserReady
tasks.description: Add packages/seed/test/test-users/markUserReady.test.ts following the port-injection + in-memory stub pattern of test/required/systemUser.seed.test.ts. Cover: AC-1.1..AC-1.4 (writes the 3 ready fields + clears pw change); AC-3.1 (preserves pre-existing settings.theme and onboarding.adminTours['other.tour']); AC-3.2 (settings=null -> valid object created); AC-2.2 (missing email -> {ok:false, reason:'not_found'}, no update call); idempotency (second run keeps same baselineAt); and that the produced settings object parses cleanly against UserSettingsSchema from @repo/schemas. AAA pattern. Acceptance: pnpm --filter @repo/seed test green.

subtasks.title: Stub UserReadyModelPort + reset state in beforeEach
Tests for AC-1.x ready fields + pw clear
Tests for AC-3.x non-destructive merge + null settings

tasks.title: Wire markUserReady into testUsers.seed.ts
tasks.description: In packages/seed/src/test-users/testUsers.seed.ts, after each of the 13 users is created/updated (create call ~line 542, role update ~line 531), call markUserReady({email: spec.email, model: userModel}). Prefer a single convergence point per user so both the freshly-created and the already-existing paths end up ready. Do not change which users are created. Acceptance: typecheck clean; a manual db:seed:test-users run leaves all 13 users with profileCompleted=true and the onboarding sentinel set.

subtasks.title: Invoke markUserReady for each test user

tasks.title: Add db:seed:ready-user ad-hoc CLI script
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/scripts/mark-user-ready.ts mirroring scripts/reset-superadmin-password.ts: load .env.local, init DB, read process.argv[2] as email (usage error + exit!=0 if missing -> AC-2.3), instantiate UserModel, call markUserReady, print a clear result, exit 0 on ok / non-zero on not_found (AC-2.2). Wire packages/seed/package.json 'seed:ready-user': 'tsx --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json ./scripts/mark-user-ready.ts' and root package.json 'db:seed:ready-user': 'pnpm --filter @repo/seed seed:ready-user'. Acceptance: pnpm db:seed:ready-user <existing-email> readies the user; missing/absent email exits non-zero with a message.

subtasks.title: Create scripts/mark-user-ready.ts (env load, DB init, argv parse, exit codes)

tasks.title: Document the ready-user flow
tasks.description: Document in packages/seed/CLAUDE.md (test-users section): what markUserReady does, that test users are ready out of the box, and the pnpm db:seed:ready-user <email> command for manually created users. Add db:seed:ready-user to the root command reference if a command list exists. Note the sentinel rationale briefly. Docs-only.

tasks.title: Verify SC-1..SC-4 via db:fresh-dev + login
tasks.description: Run pnpm db:fresh-dev. Verify SC-1 (web: a host-tier test user is NOT redirected to completar-perfil on a protected route), SC-2 (admin: logging in as a HOST test user does NOT auto-fire the host.welcome tour), SC-3 (admin what's-new does not auto-surface), SC-4 (pnpm db:seed:ready-user on a hand-created user makes it pass too). Also confirm SC-5: git diff shows zero apps/* changes. Record results in progress notes.
